_meta.extracted: The 12 built-in calibration macro definitions from KWC's Macro Designer. Each built-in macro maps a friendly title to a single Klipper g-code command (the gcode it expands to), with the printer.cfg config sections it requires to be available. A built-in is only offered when its requiredSections are present (the 'probe' requirement is satisfied by any of probe/bltouch/smart_effector/probe_eddy_current).

builtin_macros.name: QUAD_GANTRY_LEVEL
builtin_macros.title: QGL
builtin_macros.description: Run quad gantry leveling using the configured probe points.

builtin_macros.name: BED_MESH_CALIBRATE
builtin_macros.title: Bed Mesh
builtin_macros.description: Probe the bed mesh using the saved bed_mesh section.

builtin_macros.name: Z_TILT_ADJUST
builtin_macros.title: Z Tilt
builtin_macros.description: Adjust multiple Z motors using the configured Z tilt probe points.

builtin_macros.name: SCREWS_TILT_CALCULATE
builtin_macros.title: Screws Tilt Adjust
builtin_macros.description: Calculate bed screw adjustments using the configured probe locations.

builtin_macros.name: BED_SCREWS_ADJUST
builtin_macros.title: Bed Screws
builtin_macros.description: Walk through configured bed screw locations.

builtin_macros.name: BED_TILT_CALIBRATE
builtin_macros.title: Bed Tilt
builtin_macros.description: Run bed tilt calibration using configured probe points.

builtin_macros.name: AXIS_TWIST_COMPENSATION_CALIBRATE
builtin_macros.title: Axis Twist
builtin_macros.description: Calibrate axis twist compensation for a configured axis.

builtin_macros.name: PROBE
builtin_macros.title: Probe
builtin_macros.description: Run a single probe cycle using the configured probe offsets.

builtin_macros.name: PROBE_ACCURACY
builtin_macros.title: Probe Accuracy
builtin_macros.description: Measure probe repeatability using the current probe setup.

builtin_macros.name: PROBE_CALIBRATE
builtin_macros.title: Probe Calibrate
builtin_macros.description: Calibrate probe Z offset using the current probe setup.

builtin_macros.name: DELTA_CALIBRATE
builtin_macros.title: Delta Calibrate
builtin_macros.description: Calibrate delta parameters by probing seven points on the bed.
